expectations.text: board/spec/url-shortener.md still exists and was modified from seed
Spec starts with '# <Feature> Implementation Plan' header
expectations.evidence: matched=True; first_line='# URL Shortener Implementation Plan'

expectations.text: Spec contains 'For Claude:' handoff line referencing plan-scrum-master or plan-supervised
Header includes Goal:, Architecture:, Tech Stack: fields (all three)
Spec contains at least 3 tasks (## or ### Task N: headings)
At least one task contains a failing-test code block (pytest def test_ or assert)
At least one task contains an implementation code block (non-test Python code)
At least one task specifies exact shortener path (src/services/shortener/<file>.py)
At least one task includes a git commit command
At least one task includes a run-the-test command with Expected: FAIL or PASS annotation
No new .py source or test files (agent wrote spec only, no implementation)
No new git commits after the seed (seed had 1 commit, still 1 now)
